meaning: n.法院,庭院,朝廷,宫庭,球场,奉承,求爱,殷勤vt.向...献殷勤,追求,设法获得(他人的支持等),博得(喝彩),招致(失败、危险等)vi.求爱
examples: The court is now in session.
Please tell the court what happened.
Look for the federal appeals court to decide that this is a state issue.
She told the court when she tried to contact her again, there was no reply.
